factual_lookup.description: Questions asking for specific facts, parameters, columns, or version requirements directly stated in the documentation.

conceptual_explanation.description: Questions asking to explain how a concept, mechanism, or technique works and why it matters.

procedural.description: Questions asking how to perform a task, set something up, or resolve an issue step by step.

comparative.description: Questions asking to compare two or more concepts, APIs, or approaches and explain their differences.

feature_enumeration.description: Questions asking to list and describe supported features, components, configurations, or knobs.

multi_file_synthesis.description: Questions whose answers draw evidence from two or more distinct source files.
